title: K-200 GCS Risk Register
text:
# K-200 GCS Risk Register

Document number: MD-DOC-429-C. Revision: C. Type: analysis. Author: Lena Okafor. Created: 2024-03-19. Last modified: 2025-01-06. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the GCS subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1178, P-1095, P-1117.
